name: LineCapStyle
summary: Shape to be used at the ends of open curves

enum_values.name: Round
enum_values.summary: Ends are extended by a half circle with diameter equal to the curve width

enum_values.name: Flat
enum_values.summary: Also known as butt. Ends are flat and do not extend

enum_values.name: Square
enum_values.summary: Ends are flat and extended by half of the curve width
